decision: keep watch-only; donor-platform prototype; no custom electronics for MK1
summary: Modern EE/code standards intake for Orion Watch MK1. Use existing certified smartwatch hardware, customize watchface/packaging, hold custom PCB/RF/battery/waterproof/medical claims until engineer review.
requirements: Use donor watch with existing RF/battery/charger documentation.
Do not alter antenna, PCB, battery, or charger in MK1.
Use push-to-talk and visible mute state.
Do not claim water resistance unless supplier documentation supports it.
Keep Rose/Kevin C. Rose mechanism as private-IP dependency only.
